author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source Plan workflow examples across plugin docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: Plan workflow examples are repeated across plugins/pm-claude/skills/pm-planner/SKILL.md:114-143, plugins/pm-codex/skills/pm-native/SKILL.md:59-75, and plugins/pm-claude/commands/pm-planner.md:53-69. The snippets describe pm_plan purpose and JSON lifecycle examples for create/add-step/update/complete/decision/approve/materialize/show/resume, but diverge by harness, included subcommands, and example fields. Closed pm-aqat exposed Plan workflow surfaces but does not track deduplicating copied plugin examples.

A canonical Plan workflow recipe exists in docs or shared plugin reference; Claude/Codex skills and commands keep only harness-specific deltas and link to the recipe; examples stay valid against current plan contracts; docs-skills gate and focused plugin docs checks pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit

author: codex-dedupe-agent
message: Start docs dedupe for Plan workflow examples as part of combined single-source docs PR.

value.author: codex-docs-dedupe-lane
value.text: Evidence from docs/plugin single-source lane (read-only, 2026-05-25): Plan examples are duplicated in plugins/pm-claude/skills/pm-planner/SKILL.md, plugins/pm-claude/commands/pm-planner.md, plugins/pm-codex/skills/pm-native/SKILL.md, and docs/COMMANDS.md#plan-workflow. The MCP server contract lists pm_plan subcommands as create|show|add-step|update-step|complete-step|block-step|reorder-step|remove-step|link|unlink|decision|discovery|validation|resume|approve|materialize. Drift found: Claude skill has the fullest lifecycle (decision/discovery/validation/show depths) but omits block/reorder/remove/link/unlink in examples; Codex skill has a shorter lifecycle with resume but omits discovery/validation/show variants; Claude slash command has the shortest create/add/complete/approve/materialize/show/resume set. Recommendation: make docs/COMMANDS.md#plan-workflow canonical for CLI-level Plan workflow and exact subcommand examples; create or keep one shared plugin-facing recipe only if needed, then reduce Claude/Codex skills/commands to harness-specific deltas (`harness: claude-code` vs `codex`, MCP JSON shape, when to use pm_plan). Smallest edit: in plugin skills/commands, replace the copied lifecycle blocks with 3-5 lines: when to use pm_plan, harness-specific create example, and link to docs/COMMANDS.md#plan-workflow for complete lifecycle. Validation commands to wire: pm contracts --command plan --flags-only --json, pm contracts --json (or MCP tools/list via plugin smoke), pnpm quality:docs-skills, pnpm smoke:claude-plugin, pnpm smoke:codex-plugin, plus rg -n "pm_plan|pm plan" plugins/pm-claude/skills/pm-planner/SKILL.md plugins/pm-claude/commands/pm-planner.md plugins/pm-codex/skills/pm-native/SKILL.md docs/COMMANDS.md to verify only canonical page contains the full lifecycle list.
